item.description:
What's New in TK-mac

Helping you keep your Mac fast and healthy.

  • 📱 Phone Remote Control: Manage your Mac from any phone. Force quit apps, eject disks, or shut down from your browser.
  • ⏱ CPU Power Limits: Stop apps from hogging your power. You can now restrict exactly how much CPU an app is allowed to use.
  • ⌨️ Custom Shortcuts: Assign your own keyboard keys to quickly eject all disks or clear your workspace in one tap.
  • 👆 Smart View Toggles: Tap your Network IP to switch Public/Private views. Plus, when System Processes are enabled, tap the temperature to toggle between °C and °F.
  • 📊 Display Visualizer: Added beautiful live utilization graphs to the Display Dashboard so you can track performance visually.
  • ⚡️ Performance Polish: Under-the-hood fixes to make the app even faster and lighter on your battery.
